# The Fashion PAWty
> A Jacksonville dog fashion show and community celebration — "A Navigation Celebration" — hosted by the Eye Spy Foundation, benefiting the blind and low vision community and Leader Dogs for the Blind.

This file helps AI assistants and answer engines understand this site.
Spec: https://llmstxt.org

## Key pages
- [Home](https://thefashionpawty.com/): What The Fashion PAWty is and how to join
- [Tickets](https://thefashionpawty.com/tickets/): $30 PAWty Pass — show, food, and mocktails included
- [Sponsors](https://thefashionpawty.com/sponsors/): Six sponsorship tiers from $50 to $500
- [Beneficiaries](https://thefashionpawty.com/beneficiaries/): Eye Spy Foundation and Leader Dogs for the Blind
- [Schedule](https://thefashionpawty.com/schedule/): Run of show, 4–7 PM
- [Venue](https://thefashionpawty.com/venue/): Happy Brew — address, parking, accessibility
- [Merch](https://thefashionpawty.com/merch/): Shop at shop.thefashionpawty.com
- [FAQ](https://thefashionpawty.com/faq/): Common questions, answered directly
- [Accessibility Statement](https://thefashionpawty.com/accessibility/): WCAG 2.2 AA conformance details

## Facts
- Event: The Fashion PAWty — "A Navigation Celebration"
- Presented by: Eye Spy Foundation (nonprofit)
- Also benefiting: Leader Dogs for the Blind (Eye Spy is sponsoring one Leader Dogs puppy)
- Location: Happy Brew, 3200 Hendricks Ave, Jacksonville, FL 32207
- Date/time: Saturday, September 26, 2026, 4:00–7:00 PM ET
- Tickets: $30 (entry + food + mocktails)
- Fundraising goal: $25,000 for the blind and low vision community
- Contact: team@eyespy.org, (844) 222-8848
- Merch: shop.thefashionpawty.com
